mapper.select: SELECT ct.id, ct.card_id, bc.card_no_last4, bc.bank_name, ct.owner_id, cu.name AS owner_name, ct.tx_type, ct.amount, ct.tx_date, ct.description, ct.counterpart, ct.balance_snapshot, ct.remark, ct.create_time FROM card_transaction ct LEFT JOIN bank_card bc ON bc.id = ct.card_id AND bc.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN card_user cu ON cu.id = ct.owner_id AND cu.is_deleted = 0 WHERE ct.is_deleted = 0 AND ct.card_id = #{cardId} AND ct.owner_id = #{ownerId} AND ct.tx_type = #{txType} AND ct.tx_date >= #{txDateStart} AND ct.tx_date <= #{txDateEnd} ORDER BY ct.tx_date DESC, ct.create_time DESC

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type = 1 THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS totalIncome, SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type = 2 THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS totalExpense FROM card_transaction WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND card_id = #{cardId}
